products.name: Interior Direction Session
products.imageAlt: A finished living room with warm curtains and considered furnishings
products.description: A focused in-person consultation for one room, with practical direction on layout, colour, finishes and furnishing priorities.

products.name: Window Measure & Specification
products.imageAlt: A contemporary Abuja home interior with full-height windows
products.description: On-site measurement plus a curtain or blind specification for up to five windows within Abuja.

products.name: Property Condition Inspection
products.imageAlt: A contemporary residence with landscaped grounds
products.description: A visual inspection and concise action list for owners or buyers planning repairs, improvements or handover.

products.name: Post-construction Clean Deposit
products.imageAlt: A property-care professional cleaning a finished glass partition
products.description: Secures an assessment and preferred date. Final scope and balance are confirmed after the property survey.

products.name: Room Refresh Concept
products.imageAlt: A refined residential interior with layered furniture and lighting
products.description: A tailored concept board, furniture layout and sourced finish shortlist for one existing room.

products.name: Short-let Readiness Audit
products.imageAlt: A property professional reviewing plans in a contemporary building
products.description: A room-by-room readiness review covering guest function, presentation, maintenance and launch priorities.
